helpCrisisBody: Please reach a real human now. India: iCall +91-9152987821. US: dial or text 988. UK: 116 123. Or your local emergency number. Sakha is here for reflection — not for a moment that needs immediate human help.
helpStillStuck: Still stuck? Write to us at
faq1Heading: How is my journal kept private?
faq1Body: Every Sacred Reflection is sealed on your device with AES-256-GCM before it ever leaves it. The server only stores ciphertext plus plaintext metadata you choose (mood, tags, timestamp). Even our engineers cannot read your reflections.
faq2Heading: How does Sakha know what to say?
faq2Body: Sakha's replies are generated by a guided AI that retrieves verses, commentaries, and stories from a curated Bhagavad Gita corpus before answering. When the model isn't confident the answer is faithful to the source, Sakha says so rather than guessing. Insights are reflective — not therapy or medical advice.
faq3Heading: The microphone won't turn on for voice chat
faq3Body: On Android, open Settings → Apps → Kiaanverse → Permissions → Microphone and choose "Allow only while using the app". Then re-enter the Voice Companion screen. If voice still doesn't start, restart the app once — a fresh foreground service is required after permission changes.
faq4Body: The wake-word listener is opt-in. Long-press the floating lotus button on any home screen, then confirm "Turn on Hey Sakha" in the dialog. The listener only runs when the screen you're on allows ambient voice (it stays silent on auth, onboarding, and inside the Voice Companion itself, which has its own session).
faq5Body: Please reach out to someone trained to help. In India, dial iCall on +91-9152987821 or AASRA on +91-9820466726. In the US, dial or text 988. In the UK, dial 116 123. For any country, your local emergency number works. Sakha is reflective, not a replacement for a real human in crisis.
faq6Heading: How do I delete my account or my data?
faq6Body: Profile → Account → Edit Profile → scroll to the bottom for Delete Account. Encrypted journal data is permanently removed within 30 days. You can also export everything we hold for you (JSON + ciphertext bundle) before deleting — see Profile → Data & Privacy.
faq7Heading: I was charged but my subscription didn't activate
faq7Body: Subscriptions are processed by Google Play (Android) or the App Store (iOS). If the charge cleared but the app still shows the free tier, force-close and re-open the app once — the receipt usually re-validates within 60 seconds. If it persists, send us your order ID (visible in the store receipt) and we will restore the entitlement.
faq8Body: Most of the app works offline: your journal, journey progress, verse library, and saved reflections all live on the device. Sakha's real-time voice responses and KIAAN's wisdom lookups need a connection — we'll show a clear "offline" banner when something can't reach the server.
faq9Body: Sakha speaks fluently in English and Hindi today, with verse recitation also available in Sanskrit. We're actively expanding to additional Indian languages — check the in-app Language settings (Profile → Account → Language) for the latest list.
faq10Heading: How do I report a bug or suggest a feature?
faq10Body: Use the Contact Us card below or write directly to sacredquest2@gmail.com. A short description plus a screenshot or screen-recording helps us reproduce the issue much faster.
contactCrisisBody: We are not a crisis service and we cannot answer in real time. Please reach a trained human now. India: iCall +91-9152987821. US: dial or text 988. UK: 116 123. Or your local emergency number. We are here for everything else.
contactIntro: Pick the category that fits best — we use the subject line to route your message to the right person on our side.
contactFooter: We are a small team. Every email is read by a human. We answer within 7 business days — usually much sooner.
cat1Body: Tell us what's on your mind:
cat2Body:
Please include:
• The email you signed up with
• What happens when you try to log in
• Whether you can see this message means you're logged in on at least one device

Description:
cat2Hint: Include your account email so we can locate the record.
cat3Body:
Please include:
• Your store order ID (visible in Google Play / App Store receipt)
• What charge you're asking about
• Whether you are looking for a refund or a restoration

Description:
cat3Hint: Order IDs from your store receipt help us resolve faster.
cat4Body:
Please include:
• Device + Android / iOS version
• What you expected to happen
• What actually happened
• Steps to reproduce (if you can)

A screenshot or short screen-recording attached to this email is the single biggest accelerator.

Description:
cat4Hint: A screenshot or screen-recording cuts triage time in half.
cat5Body: Tell us about the moment when you wished the app could do this:
cat5Hint: Real stories beat abstract feature names.
cat6Body:
Please tell us:
• Whether you want a full data export, a deletion, or another GDPR right
• Your account email

We respond within 7 business days as required by GDPR.

Description:
cat6Hint: Per GDPR, we respond within 7 business days.
cat7Body: Tell us about your outlet or organisation and what you're hoping to discuss:
cat7Hint: Please include your name, organisation, and timeline.
terms1Body: By accessing or using Kiaanverse / MindVibe ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these Terms, please do not use the Service.
terms2Body: Kiaanverse is a personal wellness companion grounded in Bhagavad Gita wisdom. It is NOT medical software and is NOT a substitute for professional medical, psychiatric, or psychological advice. Always consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical decisions. If you are in crisis, contact local emergency services or a crisis line immediately.
terms3Body:
• You must be at least 13 years of age to use the Service.
• You agree to provide accurate registration information.
• You are responsible for keeping your password and device safe.
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
terms4Body: You retain ownership of every reflection, verse note, and journal entry you create. Your encrypted journal content is sealed on your device with AES-256-GCM before it ever leaves it — Kiaanverse cannot read it. You grant us only the limited rights needed to operate the Service (storage, sync, backup).
terms5Body:
You agree not to:
• Use the Service to harass, threaten, or harm any person.
• Attempt to access another user's account or data.
• Reverse-engineer, scrape, or disrupt the Service.
• Misrepresent Bhagavad Gita teachings or our content.
terms6Body: Premium tiers (where available) are billed through Google Play, the App Store, or Stripe. Subscriptions auto-renew until cancelled in the relevant store. Refunds follow the policy of the platform where you subscribed.
terms7Body: Sakha's guidance is generated by AI and curated against the Bhagavad Gita corpus. Insights are reflective and educational — they are not a substitute for therapy, counselling, or medical care. We continuously refine the model but do not warrant its output for any specific outcome.
terms8Body: You may delete your account at any time from Settings → Account. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or threaten the safety of other seekers. On deletion, your encrypted content is permanently removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
terms9Body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Kiaanverse and its creators are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms10Body: We may update these Terms to reflect changes in the Service or the law. Material changes will be announced in-app at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance.
terms11Body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable to your country of residence to the extent required by mandatory consumer-protection rules. Any disputes will first be addressed in good faith through direct correspondence with the contact email below.
terms12Body:
For questions about these Terms, account or billing issues, or to report a violation, write to us at:

sacredquest2@gmail.com

We answer every legal / support email within 7 business days.
privacy1Body: This Privacy Policy applies to the Kiaanverse / MindVibe mobile application and any associated services (collectively, "the Service") operated by Kiaanverse. By using the Service you agree to the practices described below.
privacy2Body: Your journal entries are encrypted using AES-256-GCM directly on your device before being stored. Kiaanverse cannot read your journal content. Only you hold the key.
privacy3Body:
We collect only what is necessary to provide the service:
• Account information (email, name)
• Usage metadata (which features you use, when)
• Journal metadata (mood labels, tags, timestamps — NOT content)
• Device information (for technical support)
privacy4Body:
• Journal entry content (always encrypted, never readable by us)
• Your private conversations with Sakha (processed in memory only)
• Payment card details (handled by Google Play / Stripe)
privacy5Body: KarmaLytix analyzes only encrypted metadata — mood labels, tags, timestamps. Your journal words are never read. This is our sacred promise.
privacy6Body: We do not sell your data. We do not share your data with advertisers. We share only what is required to operate the service (hosting, authentication providers).
privacy7Body: You have the right to access, correct, export, and delete your data. Contact: sacredquest2@gmail.com
privacy8Body:
For privacy questions, data exports, or to exercise any of your rights, write to us at:

sacredquest2@gmail.com

We answer every privacy email within 7 business days.
dp1Body: Every Sacred Reflection is sealed with AES-256-GCM on your device using a key derived from your account secret. The server only ever stores the ciphertext plus plaintext metadata you choose (mood, tags, timestamp). Even our engineers cannot read your reflections.
dp2Heading: What We Store on Our Servers
dp2Body:
• Encrypted journal blobs (ciphertext only)
• Mood + tag metadata you select
• Journey progress (which step, how far)
• Verse bookmarks (chapter + verse only)
• Account metadata (email, name, language)
• Anonymized analytics (feature usage)
dp3Body:
• Your raw journal content
• Audio of your Sakha conversations (transcripts may be retained briefly for safety review and then deleted)
• Payment card details (handled by Google Play / App Store / Stripe)
• Any data we don't explicitly need to operate the Service
dp4Body: Production data is stored in EU-region infrastructure (Frankfurt) with daily encrypted backups. We use Sentry for crash analytics (no PII), Cloudflare for content delivery, and Stripe / Google Play / App Store for billing. None of these processors can read your encrypted reflections.
dp5Body:
When you speak with Sakha (KIAAN Voice Companion):
• Audio is streamed to our servers, transcribed, and discarded.
• Transcripts are PII-scrubbed before any logging.
• You can disable conversation history in Settings → Voice.
• Crisis-trigger conversations are reviewed by safety humans only.
dp6Body:
Encrypted journals: kept until you delete them.
Account: kept until you delete your account.
Voice transcripts: 24 hours, then deleted.
Audit + safety logs: 90 days.
Backups: rolling 30-day window, then purged.
dp7Body:
You can, at any time:
• Export every byte we hold for you (JSON + ciphertext bundle).
• Delete a single entry (irreversible after 7 days).
• Delete your account (permanent removal within 30 days).
• Withdraw consent for analytics.
Use Settings → Account → Data Controls, or email sacredquest2@gmail.com.
dp8Body: Kiaanverse is intended for seekers aged 13 and above. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13. If you believe a child has registered, please contact sacredquest2@gmail.com and we will remove the account.
dp9Body: We will tell you in-app at least 14 days before any material change to how your data is handled. The full legal Privacy Policy is also linked from the Profile tab → Legal section.
